front.title: IMAP4 Extension for Named Searches (Filters)
front.workgroup: Enhancements to Internet email to Support Diverse Service Environments

abstract.t: The document defines a way to persistently store named IMAP (RFC 3501) searches on the server. Such named searches can be subsequently referenced in a SEARCH or any other command that accepts a search criterion as a parameter. [STANDARDS-TRACK]
